title: Restrictions as to location
doc_html:
§532.  Restrictions as to location

No town council, board of aldermen, or police jury shall grant any permit for the conducting of such a business within three hundred feet of any bridge over a river on any state highway, when in their discretion the conducting of such a business so located is dangerous to public safety.
doc_text:
§532.  Restrictions as to location
No town council, board of aldermen, or police jury shall grant any permit for the conducting of such a business within three hundred feet of any bridge over a river on any state highway, when in their discretion the conducting of such a business so located is dangerous to public safety.
